title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving OpsPal's stability and reliability behind the scenes. The platform now automatically cleans up outdated plugin configurations and handles dependency issues that could cause startup problems. Most importantly, Salesforce users will experience fewer errors when creating record types and adding fields to pages with Dynamic Forms enabled.

entries.headline: Platform automatically removes outdated plugin configurations
details: Works across all operating systems and plugin types
Prevents conflicts from old or broken plugin settings

entries.headline: OpsPal cleans up orphaned plugins automatically on startup
Improved Salesforce plugin startup and configuration management
details: Better handling of quality auditing tools

entries.headline: Three critical Salesforce fixes for smoother operations
details: Dynamic Forms pages now prevent invisible field additions
Record types automatically get proper permissions after creation
Routing conflicts no longer block your sessions

entries.headline: Platform automatically installs missing dependencies and shows clear error messages
details: Runs background fixes for common dependency issues
Shows helpful commands when manual fixes are needed

entries.headline: Resolved false missing package errors during startup
